inputs.text: Mujhe bahut tezi se bukhar chadha hai, sir bahut dard kar raha hai

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Acute onset fever and severe headache are common in Chikungunya

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Fever and headache can also be seen in viral fever

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Dengue is also a possibility but more symptoms are needed for confirmation

inputs.text: Ab toh aankhon ke peeche dard ho raha hai, haddiyan toot rahi hain

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Retro-orbital pain and bone pain are common in Chikungunya

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: These symptoms can also be seen in Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever is less likely now

inputs.text: Bukhar kam ho gaya hai, lal daane nikhle hain, masoodon se khoon aa raha hai
inputs.image_desc: pale appearance, dark circles under eyes

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Fever drop, rash, and bleeding gums are cardinal signs of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever is unlikely with these specific symptoms

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria is less likely with rash and bleeding gums

inputs.text: Main bahut kamzor ho gaya hoon, khud se kuch nahi kar pa raha hoon
inputs.image_desc: patient on cot, unable to move

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Extreme weakness is a common recovery symptom of Dengue
